HomePage.heroBadge: The only translator with native HWPX support
HomePage.heroDescription: AI-powered translation for text, documents, and Korean 한글 files. 20+ languages. PDF, DOCX, HWPX, and more.
HomePage.formatPreservingDescription: Xenith is the only online tool that translates HWPX (한글) and DOCX files while perfectly preserving their original formatting — headers, tables, styles, and layout stay intact. No other translator supports HWPX, the standard format for Korean government and legal documents.
HomePage.seeItInActionDescription: Your document structure stays pixel-perfect. Headers, tables, formatting — everything is preserved exactly as the original.
HomePage.hwpxTabCaption: Headers, tables, dates, and document structure are perfectly preserved in the translated HWPX file.
HomePage.docxTabCaption: Bold text, numbered sections, bullet lists, and callout boxes are all preserved in the translated DOCX file.
HomePage.conversionToolsDescription: Convert between file formats — including HWPX
HomePage.trustMessage: Your files are automatically deleted after processing. We never store your data.
HomePage.featureNativeHwpxDescription: The only online translator with full HWPX (한글) support. Translate and convert Korean government and business documents seamlessly.
HomePage.featureAiDescription: Powered by Gemini 2.5 Flash for fast, accurate translation across 20+ languages.
HomePage.featureDocTranslationDescription: Translate HWPX and DOCX files with full format preservation — headers, tables, and styles stay intact. PDF and TXT supported via text extraction.
HomePage.featureLanguagesDescription: Korean, English, Japanese, Chinese, Spanish, French, German, and many more.
HomePage.featureConversionDescription: Convert between PDF, DOCX, HWPX, and plain text. Extract text from images via OCR.
HomePage.featureBookmarkletDescription: Use our bookmarklet to translate text on any website in one click. Select, click, done. No extension needed.
HomePage.featurePrivateDescription: Your files are automatically deleted after processing. No data is stored.
HomePage.convertHwpxToPdfDesc: Convert Korean 한글 documents to PDF
HomePage.convertPdfToDocxDesc: Convert PDF to editable Word format
HomePage.faq1Q: How do I open an HWP file without Hancom Office?
HomePage.faq1A: Upload the HWP file to Xenith to convert it to PDF or extract its text. No software installation required — Xenith is the only online tool with native HWP support.
HomePage.faq2Q: How do I translate a Korean HWP document to English?
HomePage.faq2A: Go to the Translate page, click the Files tab, upload your HWP or HWPX file, set the target language to English, and click Translate File.
HomePage.faq3Q: What is the difference between HWP and HWPX?
HomePage.faq3A: HWP is the legacy binary format used by Hancom's Hangul word processor since 1989. HWPX is the modern XML-based format introduced in 2014. Both are standard in Korea for government, academic, and business documents. Xenith supports both.
HomePage.faq4Q: How do I convert HWP to PDF?
HomePage.faq4A: Go to the HWP to PDF converter, upload your .hwp file, and click Convert. The PDF will be ready to download in seconds.
HomePage.faq5A: Yes. Xenith is free with no account required. Files are processed and deleted after each operation.

InvoicePage.heroTitle: Turn Any Invoice Into a Structured Report
InvoicePage.heroDescription: Drag in Korean 세금계산서, Japanese 適格請求書, or Chinese 发票. Xenith extracts every field, validates the math, and builds your expense report — no templates, no manual entry.
InvoicePage.dropZone: Drop invoices here, or click to browse
InvoicePage.dropZoneFormats: 세금계산서 · 適格請求書 · PDF · Image · ZIP
InvoicePage.exampleDescription: From a stack of foreign invoices to a clean, validated spreadsheet in under 30 seconds.
InvoicePage.step1Description: Drop PDFs, images, or zip files. Mix formats, mix languages — Korean, Japanese, Chinese, English.
InvoicePage.step2Description: Fields are pulled from every invoice. Math is cross-checked, tax rates verified, anomalies flagged.
InvoicePage.step3Description: Get a clean Excel or CSV with all flags highlighted. Ready for accounting.
InvoicePage.capabilitiesTitle: What Xenith Invoice does for you
InvoicePage.featureCjkDescription: Reads Korean 세금계산서, Japanese 適格請求書, and Chinese 增值税发票 natively — no OCR templates, no locale config.
InvoicePage.featureMathDescription: Every subtotal, tax, and total is cross-checked. Discrepancies are flagged automatically in the output sheet.
InvoicePage.featureBatchDescription: Upload dozens of invoices at once. Drop a .zip of a month's receipts. Get one unified report back.
InvoicePage.featureExcelDescription: Summary sheet with one row per invoice, plus a validation flags sheet highlighting anomalies — every report follows the same clean structure.
InvoicePage.featureAiDescription: Traditional tools need you to map fields to templates. Xenith understands document structure in any language. Vendor name, invoice date, line items, tax, and totals — extracted without setup.
InvoicePage.formatsTitle: Everything you might receive from a vendor
InvoicePage.formatFiles: PDF · JPG · PNG · DOCX · HWPX · ZIP
InvoicePage.privacyNoStorageDesc: Your files are never stored on our servers. Processing is in-memory only.
InvoicePage.privacyEncryptedDesc: All uploads use TLS encryption. We never log document contents.
InvoicePage.privacyAutoDeleteDesc: Files are purged from memory as soon as your report is generated.
